name: PathFinder - Agentic Career Counseling Companion
description: A conversational AI career counseling agent built with Flask and IBM watsonx.ai, using an IBM Granite model to help students assess their academic strengths, surface genuine interests, and generate a personalized, step-by-step career roadmap.
problem_statement: Agentic AI for Career Counseling Companion
features: Conversational assessment of academic background, skills, and interests
Grounded recommendations using the Granite model's knowledge of industry trends
Dashboard view for skill-gap analysis and roadmap progress
Structured AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS for configurable counseling tone and safety rules

environment_variables.IBM_API_KEY: IBM Cloud API key for watsonx.ai

how_to_run: Copy .env.example to .env and fill in your IBM Cloud credentials

submission.challenge: Exploring the Power of Agentic AI with IBM Granite and LangFlow
